experiments.name: Claim Validation - HPC vs TCL/EWC on Split-CIFAR-10
experiments.notes: Single bounded stabilisation-mode validation suite. Runs exactly one authorised experiment: SGD baseline, EWC(100), EWC(1000), SI(0.01), TCL baseline, and high_penalty_conservative on Split-CIFAR-10 task-incremental with ResNet-18 for the 10-seed minimum list. Wait for current non-primary rerun work to finish before launch; do not expand beyond this manifest.

purpose: Authorise exactly one explicit claim-validation run for the high_penalty_conservative Split-CIFAR-10 result under stabilisation mode. This is a bounded, human-approved validation suite and is not permission for open-ended TAR autonomy.
